title: Paneer Spätzle mit Spicy Soße
description: A German-inspired dish featuring crispy Spätzle topped with a creamy Paneer sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, eggs, water, and salt. Mix until a smooth batter forms.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Using a Spätzlepresse or a colander with large holes, press the batter into the water.
Cook the Spätzle for 2-3 minutes, until they float to the surface. Remove with a slotted spoon.
In a separate pan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add Paneer to the pan and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
If using, add the spicy sauce to the pan and stir to combine.
Serve the Paneer mixture over the Spätzle.
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or chives.
